testcase.name: test_ai_suggestions_with_valid_data
testcase.failure: tests/test_ai_suggestions.py:92: in test_ai_suggestions_with_valid_data assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"AI service error: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0012143999999999998, Max budget: 0.001"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_selected_movie_excluded_from_suggestions
testcase.failure: tests/test_ai_suggestions.py:129: in test_selected_movie_excluded_from_suggestions assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
